data.title: Fire truck market to reach $15.74Bn in 2031 with 7.71% CAGR growth led by battery-electric units.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of January 14, 2026, the fire truck market is experiencing consistent growth as reported by Mordor Intelligence. Starting at USD 10.17 billion in 2025, it has increased to USD 10.94 billion in 2026. Projections show that the market is expected to reach USD 15.74 billion by 2031. This indicates significant expansion opportunities for the fire truck industry.

data.title: Health insurers globally are investing in AI, with only 1 in 3 ready to scale beyond pilots. - Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: Health insurers globally are prioritizing investments in data, governance, and skills, with only 33% currently equipped to expand beyond trial phases. As of January 14, 2026, insurers in London are transitioning from experimental stages to establish robust systems for long-term utilization.

data.title: Stocks like Bank of America and TG Therapeutics to watch on Wednesday as US futures decrease; BAC expected to report 96 cents per share earnings on $27.87 billion revenue. BAC shares at $54.51 after hours.
data.description: Stock futures in the U.S. are down on Wednesday morning, prompting investor attention towards certain stocks. Before the opening bell, Bank of America Corp (NYSE: BAC) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of 96 cents per share, with revenue hitting $27.87 billion according to Benzinga Pro. Meanwhile, Bank of America shares saw a slight 0.1% decrease in after-hours trading, now priced at $54.51. TG Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TGTX) also revealed its preliminary findings. For more details, the complete report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: UAB Merko Statyba named best bidder for parts B and C in Lithuanian defense campus project.
data.description: The Ministry of Defence in Lithuania has revealed that UAB Merko Statyba, which is a part of the AS Merko Ehitus group, has been selected as the top bidder for sections B and C of the public procurement project titled "Development of the infrastructure of the Rūdninkai Defence Force Campus through a public-private partnership (PPP)."

data.title: Trident Group (BSE: 521064) is expanding in Europe with new collections at Heimtextil 2026, highlighting growth.
data.description: Trident Group (BSE: 521064), a top integrated home textile manufacturer in India, is expanding its European footprint by presenting its newest products at Heimtextil 2026 in Frankfurt, Germany. Heimtextil is widely recognized as the world's largest trade fair for home textiles. This move signifies Trident Group's commitment to growing its market presence globally.

data.title: Sedgwick introduces new Global Specialty platform for complex losses on Jan. 14, 2026. Leading risk and claims partner.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in London, Sedgwick, a prominent risk and claims administration company, unveiled their latest offering, the Sedgwick Global Specialty platform. This innovative solution is specifically tailored to manage the most extensive and intricate losses worldwide. It is geared towards handling large-scale claims efficiently and effectively. The platform aims to streamline the process for tackling significant losses and provide comprehensive support in navigating complex claims.
